backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the guestbook backend with user profile management, CRUD operations for guestbook entries (add, update, delete), and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering the guestbook entry bug fix, edit/delete controls, and hamburger menu addition.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH color tokens for light and dark modes covering background, foreground, card, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the VTH Guest Book app, loading Leaflet CSS and JS via CDN and mounting the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for feed, add entry, entry detail, world map, and AT map pages, wrapped in QueryClientProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutDialog.tsx: Modal dialog component describing the VTH Guest Book project, the vicarious thru-hiker concept, and the Internet Computer foundation, with the VTH logo displayed.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout component rendering the sticky VTH-branded header with HamburgerMenu and optional logout button, a bottom navigation bar with four routes, and a main content outlet.
frontend/src/components/CreateAccountDia: A dialog component that explains Internet Identity and the Internet Computer to users, providing a login button that triggers the Internet Identity authentication flow.
A dialog form for editing an existing guestbook entry, pre-populating fields from the entry and submitting updates via the useUpdateEntry mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: A hamburger menu button that toggles a dropdown with links to open the About, Create Account/Login, and How to Use dialogs.
frontend/src/components/HowToUseDialog.t: A dialog that displays step-by-step instructions for using the VTH Guest Book app, covering signing entries, pinning locations, exploring maps, and browsing the feed.
frontend/src/components/MapLegend.tsx: A small card component that displays a legend hint instructing users to tap a map pin to view the associated entry.
frontend/src/components/MapPin.tsx: A button component rendering an SVG map pin marker that changes color and scale when selected.
frontend/src/components/PlaceSearchField: A search input component that queries a geocoding API for place names, displays multiple results in a dropdown for selection, and calls an onSelect callback with the chosen GeocodingResult.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous Internet Computer actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend canister interactions including fetching guestbook entries, user profiles, and mutations for adding, updating, and deleting entries.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a warm earthy OKLCH color palette with CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, plus custom scrollbar and touch-friendly styles.
frontend/src/lib/geocoding.ts: Utility module that queries the OpenStreetMap Nominatim API to search for places by name and returns normalized results with display name and coordinates.
frontend/src/lib/guestbookFormat.ts: Formatting utilities for guestbook data including truncating principal IDs, converting nanosecond timestamps to readable dates, formatting coordinates, and encoding/decoding place name tags embedded in comment strings.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` helper that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddEntryPage.tsx: Page component with a form for authenticated users to submit a new guestbook entry including optional name, trail name, comment, current location (via GPS or search), and a favorite place search field.
frontend/src/pages/ATMapPage.tsx: Page component that renders an interactive Leaflet map displaying custom pin markers for guestbook entries that include a favorite place location along the Appalachian Trail.
frontend/src/pages/EntryDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single guestbook entry's full details (author, trail, location, comment) fetched by timestamp URL param. Allows the entry owner or admin to edit or delete the entry.
frontend/src/pages/GuestbookFeedPage.tsx: Renders a reverse-chronological feed of all guestbook entries as cards with preview text and location info. Owners and admins can edit or delete entries inline.
frontend/src/pages/WorldMapPage.tsx: Displays a Leaflet world map with custom SVG pin markers for all guestbook entries that have location data. Popups show author name, place name, trail, and a comment preview.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (including logo-specific tokens), extended border radii, font families, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the VTH Guest Book app's project state, architectural notes, known issues, and feature list for an ICP-based map guest book app. Documents three existing features: a bug fix for text entry persistence, delete/edit controls, and a hamburger menu.
